calls.title: EIC Accelerator Open 2026
calls.summary: For startups and SMEs bringing a breakthrough innovation from validation to market and international scale.

calls.title: EIC STEP Scale Up 2026
calls.summary: For high-growth European technology companies preparing an investment round of €50 million or more.

calls.title: Common Research Framework for Information Integrity
calls.summary: Build shared research infrastructure and cross-border capacity to understand manipulation, AI-generated content and online information risks.

calls.title: European EdTech Accelerator
calls.summary: Create an EU-wide accelerator that funds and tests European EdTech solutions in real education and training environments.
